title: selaginella bryoides
intro: Selaginella bryoides, also known as the mossy club moss, is a type of small, non-vascular plant that belongs to the family Selaginellaceae. It is valued for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory, antiseptic, and antimicrobial activities. The health benefits of Selaginella bryoides include treating various conditions such as fever, respiratory issues, and skin problems, while also being used as a natural remedy for wound healing and reducing inflammation. The herbal preparations of this plant can be made into infusions, tinctures, or salves, allowing for its medicinal properties to be utilized in various forms.
